name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Standard mutual NDA created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law. Covers mutual confidentiality obligations between two parties.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual NDA. To be completed with the specific business terms and signed by both parties; incorporates the Mutual NDA Standard Terms by reference.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Standard agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products. Created by a committee of over 40 attorneys and covers the full lifecycle of a cloud software subscription.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Standard SLA designed to be used alongside the Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement (CSA). Defines uptime commitments, remedies, and service credits for cloud software providers.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Standard DPA for governing the processing of personal data under a service agreement. Created by a committee of over 40 attorneys to support GDPR and other data-privacy compliance requirements.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Standard agreement for design-partner arrangements in which an early-stage customer collaborates with a vendor to shape product development in exchange for early access and favorable terms.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Standard agreement for professional services engagements. Covers project-based or ongoing services, deliverables, SOW terms, payment, and intellectual-property ownership.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard agreement for formalizing business partnerships between companies. Covers roles, revenue sharing, intellectual property, and the terms of the collaborative relationship.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Standard BAA required under HIPAA for vendors who handle protected health information (PHI) on behalf of a covered entity. Created by a committee of over 40 attorneys.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Standard agreement for licensing software to customers. Covers license grant, restrictions, fees, support, and termination for on-premise or hybrid software products.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Short-term agreement allowing a prospective customer to trial a product or service before committing to a full commercial contract. Suitable for paid or free pilots with limited scope and easy termination.

name: AI Addendum
description: Standard addendum for AI-specific provisions to be attached to a primary service agreement. Addresses AI-related data use, model training restrictions, output ownership, and liability considerations.
